## ✅ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-23 13:44:48 PT

Found 0 violations. All changes follow dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL exception handling - All checks are proactive and explicit
✅ Path operations - Not applicable to this PR
✅ Variable scope - Variables declared and used appropriately
✅ Import organization - No modifications to imports
✅ Indentation depth - All code within acceptable limits
✅ Property performance - Not applicable to this PR
✅ Type annotations - Compliant with Python 3.11 standards

### Simplification Quality Assessment

**Consolidation Pattern**: Successfully reduced two related states ("implementing"/"implemented") into single "impl" stage throughout codebase.

**Before**: `is_implementing or is_implemented or is_review`
**After**: `is_impl or is_review`

This consolidation correctly reduces complexity without losing functionality. The code is clearer and more maintainable.
